title: Prototype GPU acceleration for belief propagation
description: Investigate GPU acceleration for LDPC belief propagation decoding. The BP loop is 70% of decoding time and highly data-parallel, making it a strong candidate for GPU offload. Key research questions: Is BP memory-bound or compute-bound on GPU? What is the crossover point vs 24-core CPU? Decision criteria: Go if GPU >3x faster than CPU for batch size >100, Investigate if 1.5-3x, Abandon if <1.5x.
